class.name: ResonanceRuntime
class.brief_description: Scene configuration node for Nexus Resonance. Initializes and drives the audio engine.
class.description: Nexus Resonance scene configuration node. Add via Add Child Node > ResonanceRuntime. Assign a ResonanceRuntimeConfig resource (create new or link existing) for runtime settings. Handles ResonanceServer init, listener fallback when no ResonanceListener, reverb bus activator, pathing/reflection debug visualization, and notifying probe volumes when config changes.

method.name: get_config_dict
method.description: Returns config dict for init_audio_engine. Merges runtime config resource with node's debug flags (debug_occlusion).

members.member: Runtime configuration resource. Create or link an existing .tres. Auto-created default if empty.
Key to toggle debug overlay at runtime (default: F3).
Enable optional performance overlay (FPS, frame time). Toggle with F4.
Key to toggle performance overlay at runtime (default: F4).
Draw source and reflection rays for debugging. Requires ResonanceServer debug support.
